summary: Supabase migration testing completed. Auth, Flowboard, HotelContext, PMS iframe, and Housekeeping all working. 11/11 test features verified. One minor bug found: Timeline shows 'Invalid Date' for arrival/departure times.

ui_bugs.issue: Timeline events show 'Invalid Date' instead of proper time (e.g., '15:00' for arrivals, '11:00' for departures)
ui_bugs.root_cause: Timeline events are created with hardcoded time strings ('15:00', '11:00') but the TimelineEvent component expects a Date object for new Date(event.time).toLocaleTimeString()

passed_tests: Login with Supabase Auth (admin@flowtym.com / admin123) → Successful login, redirect to /flowboard
Login with invalid credentials → Error message 'Invalid login credentials' displayed
Flowboard displays KPIs from Supabase: Occupation (27%), Arrivées (1), Départs (1), En séjour (3 clients), Chambres libres (8/11), Ménage fait (0/0)
Flowboard displays hotel name 'Flowtym Paris' and date 'dimanche 12 avril'
Flowboard displays Timeline du jour with 2 events (arrivals/departures)
Flowboard displays Quick Actions (Nouvelle réservation, Check-in, Check-out, Housekeeping, Rapports)
Hotel selector in top navigation shows 'Flowtym Paris'
User profile shows 'Admin Flowtym' with 'Direction' role
PMS module (/pms) works via iframe - shows Check-in/Check-out view with clients (Sophie Dubois, Ali Larabi)
Housekeeping module (/housekeeping) is accessible with navigation tabs (Réception, Direction, Gouvernante, etc.)
Logout works - redirects to login page after clicking Déconnexion
action_items: Fix Timeline 'Invalid Date' bug in Flowboard.jsx - change time format from string ('15:00') to proper Date object or update TimelineEvent to handle time strings
critical_code_review_comments: Flowboard.jsx line 439-447: Timeline events use hardcoded time strings but TimelineEvent expects Date objects
E-reputation scores are MOCKED (hardcoded at 4.2/5) in Flowboard.jsx line 482

success_rate.frontend: 91% (10/11 features working, 1 minor date formatting bug)

seed_data_creation: None required - using existing Supabase data (11 rooms, 7 reservations)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Supabase migration verified. Auth uses Supabase Auth (not MongoDB JWT). Flowboard computes KPIs client-side from Supabase tables (rooms, reservations, room_cleaning_tasks). HotelContext loads hotels from Supabase with fallback to legacy API. PMS iframe integration working. Housekeeping module uses V2 NestJS API. One bug: Timeline shows 'Invalid Date' - needs fix in Flowboard.jsx timeline event creation.

mocked_apis.E-reputation: global_score hardcoded at 4.2/5 with platforms Google: 4.3, Booking: 4.1, TripAdvisor: 4.2

rca_of_issue.root_cause: In Flowboard.jsx lines 439-447, timeline events are created with time as a string ('15:00', '11:00'). The TimelineEvent component (line 89) uses new Date(event.time).toLocaleTimeString() which fails to parse the time string, resulting in 'Invalid Date'.
rca_of_issue.fix: Either: 1) Create proper Date objects for timeline events, or 2) Update TimelineEvent to handle time strings directly without Date parsing
